## Circos overview

> Tracks (outer → inner): **ideogram**, **somatic SNVs** (coloured by 6-class SBS category), **non-BND SVs** (DEL/DUP/INV/INS), **ASCAT copy number** (major = red, minor = blue, total = black). Translocation links shown inside.

```{r circos-plot, fig.align='center'}
if (!is.null(circos_tmp) && file.exists(circos_tmp)) {
  img_b64 = base64enc::base64encode(circos_tmp)
  tags$img(src  = paste0("data:image/svg+xml;base64,", img_b64),
           style = "max-width:750px; display:block; margin:auto;")
} else {
  tags$div(class = "alert alert-warning",
           "Circos plot could not be generated. Check that ASCAT and Severus output files are present.")
}
```
